top_signals.title: Ukraine says Russia is deploying AI-powered malware on the battlefield
top_signals.summary: A new report from Ukraine’s National Security and Defense Council says Russia’s use of AI across cyber operations expanded dramatically over the past year, reshaping everything from social engineering campaigns to malware development and creating what Ukrainian officials describe as a growing imbalance between attackers and defenders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
